title: Unbelievable Definition 2048x
body:
# 🎨 Photorealism Like Never Seen Before!

![Preview Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90fbc5235f932537b7d91d703ad7def27767d51c.jpeg)

Transform your Minecraft experience into a whole new level 💫

- 2048 x 2048 Resolution, delivering the highest level of detail and quality.
- Hand-made Heightmaps for stunning POM effects. (Requires shaders)
- Normal maps for all supported blocks.
- Supports popular shaders (such as BSL, Complimentary Reimagined, etc.)

Supported list of blocks include:
- Black Concrete (as asphalt)
- Acacia Log (as asphalt with white stripes)
- Smooth Stone
- Obsidian
- Podzol
- Deepslate (Including stairs, slabs, etc.)
- Moss Block
- Bricks (Including stairs, slabs, etc.)
- Chiseled Stone Bricks (Including stairs, slabs, etc.)
- Cobblestone
- Stone
- Stone Bricks (Including stairs, slabs, etc.)
- Coarse Dirt (Variation 1)
- Dirt (Variation 2)
- Cracked Stone Bricks (Including stairs, slabs, etc.)
- Oak Log
- Oak Planks
- Grass Block

Make sure to use this resource pack with a shaderpack that supports POM! I recommend SEUS PTGI HRR 3 or Complimentary Reimagined.

🎁 You can download the demo version of this pack for FREE (Check versions) The full version is also available for only $1, on my Patreon! _It helps me make more cool stuff like this :)_

Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/parsafarvadian](https://www.patreon.com/parsafarvadian)
